contact.subtitle: Open to senior support, platform, and cloud engineering roles, remote or Toronto based. Drop a message and it lands straight in my inbox.

experience.title: Five years on the
experience.subtitle: Banking, GIS, healthcare, and enterprise data management. Always at the point where customers meet complex systems.

bullets: Resolve 450+ enterprise tickets across data quality, metadata/cataloging, MDM/RDM, APIs, and hybrid Kubernetes/Helm environments.
Root-cause production issues using SQL, Grafana/Loki (LogQL), REST/SOAP API testing, and environment diagnostics across PROD-EU, PROD-US, and non-prod clusters.
Troubleshoot connectivity and pushdown job failures against Snowflake and Databricks, including JDBC, auth, and permission issues.
Contribute to an AI-powered Slack triage bot (Claude API, in production) that classifies tickets and surfaces similar past issues.
Sustain a 96% first-response SLA and 4.8/5 CSAT while authoring knowledge-base content that deflects repeat tickets.
Administered SQL Server and automated maintenance with PowerShell and Bash, including log rotation, backups, and user management.
Deployed and secured Azure services (VMs, Blob Storage, App Services); managed Entra ID with role-based access control.
Cut cloud infrastructure costs 20% via Azure Advisor recommendations and Reserved VM Instances.
Supported the Remote Deposit Capture platform, covering SQL data issues, SOAP/REST integrations, and third-party system onboarding.
Built a knowledge base that reduced support tickets by 30% and sped up resolution times.
Participated in on-call rotations for critical out-of-hours incidents across North America.

triage.subtitle: I contribute to an LLM-based Slack bot that triages incoming support tickets for the whole team, suggesting classification, routing, and likely root causes from historical data.

features.title: Auto-classification & routing
features.text: Incoming tickets are classified by product area and severity, then routed to the right queue before a human touches them.

features.title: RAG over Jira, Notion & Slack
features.text: Retrieves similar past issues by error code and symptom across three knowledge sources to suggest likely root causes.

features.title: Live in production
features.text: Built on the Claude API and running daily in production, cutting manual triage time and speeding up first response.

capabilities.title: From symptom to
capabilities.subtitle: Enterprise SaaS support at the platform level, where the fix might live in a Helm chart, a SQL query, an IAM policy, or a JDBC driver.

cards.title: Root-cause analysis
cards.text: Stack traces, timeouts, OOMKills. I dig through application logs, SQL state, and environment diagnostics until the actual cause is found, not just the symptom.

cards.title: Kubernetes & cloud
cards.text: Troubleshooting hybrid Kubernetes/Helm deployments and Azure infrastructure, backed by Azure Administrator and Terraform Associate certifications.

cards.title: Data platforms
cards.text: I write SQL daily across PostgreSQL, MSSQL, Snowflake, and Databricks to validate data quality output, reproduce discrepancies, and fix connectivity.

cards.title: APIs & identity
cards.text: REST, SOAP, and GraphQL integration debugging, plus authentication and access issues across Keycloak, Entra ID, and RBAC.

cards.title: Escalation partner
cards.text: Bridging customers with engineering, DevOps, and product teams. I reproduce defects, validate workarounds, and write docs so issues don't come back.

hero.subtitle: 5+ years resolving complex production issues across Kubernetes, Azure, SQL, and observability stacks. I trace every problem from first alert to root cause to fix.
